final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial documentary photo for a Weibo news/trending post, strict 16:9 wide banner, in the chromatic spirit of Saul Leiter's street work meeting Chinese urban photojournalism.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary street photography, the texture of a high-end smartphone shot taken on the scene — sharp, immediate, unposed, with the dramatic chiaroscuro of dusk pressing against neon
Composition: wide horizontal frame, city skyline stretching across the full width, foreground pedestrians in motion blur anchoring the lower third, generous sky area in the upper half for text overlay breathing room
Subject: hurrying pedestrians crossing a city street at dusk, silhouettes and half-lit faces, the human current of a city winding down
Scene/backdrop: urban skyline at golden hour transitioning into blue hour — distant skyscrapers reflecting the last ember of sunset on their glass facades, neon signs beginning to glow along the street level, the city caught between two lights
Lighting/mood: the dramatic tension between warm amber sunset reflected on glass towers and the cool blue-pink neon rising from street level — hard shadows and soft halos coexisting, the loneliness and warmth of dusk in a crowd
Color palette: deep amber and burnt orange in the sky, cool neon pink and electric blue at street level, the silhouettes of pedestrians as dark anchors between the two temperatures
Materials/textures: photorealistic glass reflection, wet pavement catching neon, the grain of a real handheld shot, sharp architectural edges dissolving into atmospheric haze at distance
Text (verbatim): 城市里的安静时刻｜黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙｜@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察
Constraints: strict 16:9 ratio, "城市里的安静时刻" as large bold headline in a prominent position using a modern Chinese sans-serif or 黑体 style, "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as subtitle below the headline, "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as a small watermark in the bottom-right corner, sufficient blank sky/wall space for text placement, photorealistic rendering
Avoid: illustrated or painterly look, artificial HDR over-processing, generic stock-photo composition, soft-focus romance aesthetic, any stuffer quality signals
